positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical pattern featuring oversized, glowing bioluminescent leaves and vines interwoven with geometric cosmic mandalas. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and psychedelic illustration, using clean silhouettes and hard, crisp edges. Composition is centered and radiates outwards, designed for apparel printing. Color palette should be rich jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted against an obsidian black background. Emphasize high contrast, smooth vectors, perfect symmetry, and an ethereal glow emanating from the flora.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, photorealistic, gradient shading, messy, sketch
